questions.question: 1. On a scale of 1 to 5, how difficult was it to understand the caption itself?
2. On a scale of 1 to 5, how difficult was it to add visual highlights to the chart for this caption?
2-1. What were you trying to help others understand through your drawing and visual highlights?
questions.placeholder: Describe what you aimed to convey...

questions.question: 2-2. Briefly explain why you chose that difficulty rating for adding visual highlights to the chart for this caption.
